sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79803" key="pa/rouros2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πάρουρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">οὐρά</etym>) <sense id="n79803.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">beside the tail</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ptol.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Alm.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.1</biblScope></bibl>, al.</sense> </entryFree>
